top3.sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE c.colour = 'Blue' AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) -
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     WHERE s.eye_colour_id IS NULL AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) AS difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE c.colour = 'blue' AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) -
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     LEFT JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE c.colour IS NULL AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) AS difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE c.colour = 'Blue' AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) -
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     WHERE s.eye_colour_id IS NULL AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) AS difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     LEFT JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE (c.colour = 'Blue' OR s.eye_colour_id IS NULL) AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) -
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     WHERE s.eye_colour_id IS NULL AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) -
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE c.colour = 'Blue' AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) AS difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE c.colour = 'blue' AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) -
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL AND c.colour = 'No Hair' AND c.colour IS NULL) AS difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*)

     WHERE c.colour = 'Blue' AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) -
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     WHERE s.eye_colour_id IS NULL AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) AS difference

    (SELECT COUNT(*)

    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     WHERE s.eye_colour_id IS NULL AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) -
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE c.colour = 'Blue' AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) AS difference

    (SELECT COUNT(*)

    (SELECT COUNT(*)

     WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL AND c.colour = 'No Hair' AND c.colour IS NULL) AS difference

final.sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE c.colour = 'Blue' AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) -
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM superhero s 
     WHERE s.eye_colour_id IS NULL AND s.weight_kg IS NULL) AS difference
